ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode (0, 1, 2, ...) */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received at the end of the episode */,
  "coins_left" INTEGER /* Number of coins left at the end of the episode */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value used during the episode */,
  "steps_taken" INTEGER /* Total steps taken during the episode */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., LOSE, WIN) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the episode started */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who conducted the episode */,
  "environment_state" TEXT /* Initial state of the environment */,
  "final_state" TEXT /* Final state of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the hyperparameters belong to */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the experiment */,
  "discount_factor" REAL /* Discount factor used in the experiment */,
  "epsilon_decay" REAL /* Epsilon decay rate used in the experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in training */,
  "hidden_layers" TEXT /* Architecture of the neural network */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the results belong to */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the experiment */,
  "average_reward" REAL /* Average reward across all episodes */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of episodes that resulted in a win */,
  "max_reward" REAL /* Maximum reward achieved in the experiment */,
  "min_reward" REAL /* Minimum reward achieved in the experiment */,
  "std_dev_reward" REAL /* Standard deviation of the rewards */,
  "average_steps" REAL /* Average number of steps taken across all episodes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message detailing the event or status */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
